events.title: Color Splash Playdate Tuesdays
events.description: Join us for a vibrant journey into the world of colors! A hands-on, sensory-rich experience designed especially for the little ones! Dates/times vary. Click for details!

events.title: EastArts Workshop Series 1: Japanese Stencil Dyeing - Ise Katagami
events.description: Join us for EastArts, a vibrant workshop series that immerses kids in the captivating traditions and creative expressions of East Asian arts and craft techniques! Dates and times vary!

events.title: EastArts Workshop Series 2: Planet Earth Scrap Sticker Lab
events.description: Join us for EastArts, a vibrant workshop series that immerses kids in the captivating traditions and creative expressions of East Asian arts and craft techniques! Dates and times vary!

events.title: In the Community: Basics Houston Fun*Shops
events.description: Dive headfirst into the captivating world of early childhood development, where each moment spent engaging with your baby becomes a masterpiece of neurological brilliance. Dates/Times vary!

events.title: Kaleidoscope Colloquiums
events.description: Discover our newest exhibit, Faithful Friends, with fun and engaging programming that inspire children to ask questions and learn about the diverse world of faith, beliefs, culture, and friendship!

events.title: STEM Bites for Little Learners: Build a Boat Challenge
events.description: Get ready for some hands-on science fun with planting daisy seeds while understanding how living things grow!

events.title: Storytime, Sing, Move and Play!
events.description: Discover rhythm, melody, and movement with fun, hands-on music games inspired by famous operas. Kids will explore creativity and build a lasting love for the arts! Dates/times vary. Click for details!

events.title: Yoga for Little Learners
events.description: Yoga for Little Learners is a playful and calming yoga session designed for young children through gentle movement, imaginative storytelling and more!

events.title: Bad Art Club: Create Your Own Disaster-Piece Craft Event
events.description: Join us for a fun and quirky night where creativity knows no bounds! You’ll receive an assortment of craft materials and one simple mission: create your very own "disaster-piece." Whether you’re an experienced artist or a complete beginner, this event is all about having fun with DIY crafts. Secure your spot and let your creativity run wild!

events.title: Worldwide Kids Party!
events.description: It’s time to press play on play as we power up for a full day of fun at the Museum! From games to creativity to power play, there’s something for everyone. Can you come out to play?!

events.title: Bring Your Family to Storytime!
events.description: Join us for Family Storytime, where we bring books to life through stories, songs, and activities that everyone in the family will enjoy! This interactive event encourages a love of reading and is perfect for families. Whether you’re a parent, grandparent, or caregiver, you’ll love this cross-generational literacy experience designed to make read

events.title: Bring Your Family to Storytime! A Fun Literacy Experience in English and Spanish
events.description: Join us for Family Storytime, where we bring books to life through stories, songs, and activities that everyone in the family will enjoy! events.title: Storytime & Songs for Little Ones!
events.description: Enjoy a special time with your baby at our Storytime & Songs for Little Ones! This interactive session includes stories, rhymes, movement, and songs that will capture your baby's attention and encourage important developmental skills. events.title: Kaleidoscope Workshop Series
events.description: Join us for hands-on learning workshops in Kaleidoscope! Dates/times vary. Click for details!

events.title: BASF Kids' Labs
events.description: Join us and bring your creativity and curiosity! Young scientists, artists, and inventors can explore, experiment, and have hands-on fun!

events.title: Bank of America Museums on Us®
events.description: Bank of America invites cardholders to receive free general admission to more than 225 cultural institutions in dozens of cities across the US, including Children's Museum Houston!

events.title: EastArts Workshop Series 1: Japanese Stencil Dyeing - Ise Katagami
events.description: Join us for EastArts, a vibrant workshop series that immerses kids in the captivating traditions and creative expressions of East Asian arts and craft techniques! Dates and times vary!

events.title: Kick It Off, Houston!
events.description: Join Chevron at Children’s Museum Houston for a family-friendly celebration of global soccer with interactive activities, STEM fun, and cultural experiences for all ages!

events.title: ExxonMobil Second Thursday Free Family Night
events.description: ExxonMobil turns every second Thursday of the month into a thrilling free evening adventure! Free Family Night hours are from 5 pm to 8 pm!

events.title: Let's Play! Soccer Party
events.description: Opening day brings the heat! Summer soccer celebration blasts off with a high-energy kickoff event where families can jump into the action from the first whistle!

events.title: Shriners Children's Texas Free Family Night Thursday
events.description: Power up your evening at Children’s Museum Houston during Shriners Children's Texas™ Free Family Night Thursdays, where curiosity clocks in after hours!

events.title: Bumper Boats and Cruiser Boats
events.description: Motorized Bumper Boats and Cruiser Boats offer Discovery Green visitors a fun new way to experience The Boat Basin and Kinder Lake.

events.title: Global Goal Soccer Party
events.description: Houston’s international spirit takes the spotlight during a colorful cultural celebration inspired by soccer countries from around the globe while enjoying live pop-up performances, music and dance!

events.title: Mini Makers Workshop
events.description: Create soccer crafts with the Discovery Green Ambassadors at Mini Makers Workshop!

events.title: Rewind & Play: Soccer Edition!
events.description: Rewind & Play is the Children’s Museum Houston’s signature adults‑only night—where growing up takes a backseat and play takes over!

events.title: CMH Extended Summer Hours
events.description: Summer fun doesn’t have to end when the day does. Join us for Special Summer Extended Hours on the first Friday of each month and enjoy extra evening time filled with hands-on activities, exploration,

events.title: Final Kickoff Soccer Party
events.description: Before the summer celebration takes its final bow, families can enjoy one last victory lap when the Museum stays open until 8 p.m. for extended evening fun!
